transactions.desc: Duno was promoted to Double-A Chattanooga on Sunday.
Voth elected free agency Friday after clearing waivers, Bobby Nightengale of The Minnesota Star Tribune reports.
Culpepper (hip) went 0-for-4 with a strikeout in his return to the Triple-A St. Paul lineup in Sunday's 3-0 loss to Louisville after being reinstated from the 7-day injured list.
The Orioles claimed Zulueta off waivers from the Cubs on Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk, Matt Weyrich of The Baltimore Sun reports.
The Red Sox activated Gonzalez (shoulder) from the 60-day injured list Sunday. He'll start at designated hitter and bat fifth in the Red Sox's series finale versus the Yankees.
The Red Sox optioned Gasper to Triple-A Worcester on Sunday, Tim Healey of The Boston Globe reports.
The Rockies reinstated Beck (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Albuquerque.
The Giants designated Kennedy for assignment Sunday.

The Cubs recalled Wicks from Triple-A Iowa, and he's expected to pitch in bulk relief behind opener Ryan Rolison during Sunday's game against the Brewers, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.
The Cubs designated Velasquez for assignment Sunday.
The Rays optioned Grove to Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
The Rays recalled Martin from Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
The Tigers optioned De Jesus to Triple-A Toledo on Sunday, Evan Woodbery of MLive.com reports.

Santos (adductor) was reinstated from Triple-A Sacramento's 7-day injured list Wednesday, and he allowed three earned runs on two hits and three walks while striking out one over two-thirds of an inning in Friday's 13-6 win over Las Vegas.
The Giants reinstated Ramos (quadriceps) from the 10-day injured list Sunday. He'll start at designated hitter and bat third in the Giants' series finale versus Atlanta.
The Guardians optioned Halpin to Triple-A Columbus on Sunday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Tigers activated Flaherty (ankle) from the 15-day injured list to start Sunday's game against the Astros, Evan Woodbery of MLive.com reports.
The Orioles designated Huff for assignment Sunday.
The Rangers reinstated Carter (oblique) from the 10-day injured list. He'll start in center field and bat seventh Sunday against the Blue Jays.
The Orioles optioned Jackson to Triple-A Norfolk on Sunday.
The Orioles reinstated Beavers (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Sunday.
The Orioles reinstated Rutschman (concussion) from the 7-day injured list Sunday. He'll start at catcher and bat third in the Orioles' series finale with the Nationals.
The Guardians reinstated DeLauter (rib) from the 10-day injured list Sunday.
The Astros recalled Ullola from Triple-A Sugar Land on Sunday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Reds recalled Friedl from Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
Carrasco signed a minor-league contract with Atlanta on Saturday.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded RHP Hayden Juenger to the  Athletics.
Santana agreed to a minor-league contract with Atlanta on Saturday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.
Teng was optioned to Triple-A Sugar Land on Saturday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The A's designated Harris for assignment on Saturday.
